metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5494
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 8: STORM super-resolution microscopy of cortical neuron cultures labeled for anti-ATM and anti-VAMP2 showed ATM was localized to synaptic vesicles. Further validations for presynaptic (and not postsynaptic) localization include labeling for presynaptic Piccolo and postsynaptic Homer1.

"The colocalization of the two proteins clearly shows that the structures identified by the ATM are synaptic vesicles. By creating intensity histograms from the STORM images (Fig. 8D), we found that over 90% of the VAMP2 labeling formed a double-peak distribution, with the peaks separated by about 40 nm, the diameter of a synaptic vesicle. ATM labeling was consistently found attached, and in some cases overlapping, with the VAMP2 labeling (Fig. 8D).". Experimental description: M&M: "Cortical neuron culture. E16 wild-type mouse cortex was digested"

antibody:
anti-ATM primary antibody [2C1(1A1), ab78; Abcam]
